title: calceolaria × wettsteiniana
intro: Calceolaria × wettsteiniana, also known as the slipper flower, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Calceolaria genus, which consists of flowering plants native to South America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Calceolaria × wettsteiniana include its ability to soothe coughs and reduce congestion, making it a popular herbal remedy for respiratory ailments. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
